attributes.action: Issue oil and gas licenses and reduce tax in the North Sea now to offset Iran
attributes.additional_details: We want the government to take action to reduce oil and gas taxation in the North Sea and issue new licences again to promote our own reserves.
attributes.background: We need to defend our country against rising oil and gas prices.

departments.name: Department for Energy Security and Net Zero

rejection.details:
You may wish to sign this petition which calls for similar action:
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/763065
